hero.art_prompt: Diya, an 18 year old Indian girl in a modest kurti, smiling as she studies coding on a laptop at a tidy desk at home, bright hopeful daytime, warm and aspirational.

panels.narration: Diya's town had no strong computer-applications college.
panels.dialogue: Do I have to move away?
panels.img_prompt: Diya, 18, in a modest kurti at her window looking toward a faraway city, a brochure in hand, thoughtful hopeful, small-town home.

panels.narration: Leaving home for a distant campus felt daunting.
panels.img_prompt: Diya looking torn while glancing between a packed bag and a family photo on the wall, warm modest room.

panels.narration: Then she found a recognised BCA she could do online.
panels.img_prompt: Diya's face lighting up with relief at a laptop showing an online BCA, warm glow, tidy home study corner.

panels.narration: Now she studies at home, her degree on track.
panels.img_prompt: Diya happily attending an online BCA class on her laptop at home, notebook beside her, proud family in the background, warm encouraging light.

turn.title: Why An Online BCA Just Works
points: Study 100% online from anywhere. No relocation, no hostel, no commute.
The same UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ BCA as on-campus, recognised everywhere.
Just ₹1,47,000 for the full 3-year BCA (₹49,000/year), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
Weekend live classes plus recordings, so learning fits around your life.

testimonials.name: Diya Menon
testimonials.quote: There was no good tech college in my town. Studying online let me earn a real BCA without leaving home.

testimonials.name: Sana Iqbal
testimonials.quote: The monthly EMI fit my budget, and weekend classes fit my schedule. It just worked.

testimonials.name: Divya Rao
testimonials.quote: A recognised degree earned from home. My internship team accepted it without a second thought.

testimonials.name: Meena S
testimonials.quote: I studied around family responsibilities and still graduated on time. That flexibility changed everything.

facts.v: 100% online from home, weekend live classes
Same recognised BCA, no hostel or commute
UGC-entitled online BCA, NAAC A++ accredited
